title: Was The Last Supper Actually Just a Mystery Ritual?
summary: This interview excerpt discusses whether the Last Supper was a mystery ritual, exploring the distinction between indigenous spiritual practices with omnipresent spirituality versus Roman institutional religion that lacked such presence. The conversation touches on how the Last Supper, a Jewish Seder/Passover ritual, may have been an attempt to recreate spiritual presence.

key_claims.claim: The Last Supper was a Jewish Seder/Passover ritual
Indigenous and tribal communities believe in the presence of spirituality in many things like forests, rivers, sky beings, and trees
The institution of Rome lacked spiritual presence, and rituals like the Last Supper were attempts to recreate that presence
